{{Quote|When the war droids breached the armory, the uprising became a catastrophe. They were juggernauts, and for them it was as easy as returning home.|Conflagration: An Eyewitness Report of the Great Droid Uprising|<ref name="NEGTD" />}}
The '''Juggernaut war droid''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] constructed by [[Duwani Mechanical Products/Legends|Duwani Mechanical Products]] and designed specifically for use by the [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic rocket-jumper]] corps, serving as a combat unit to complement their existing [[R-EAU Linemaster]] droids that the Juggernauts were designed off of.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Juggernaut_and_K-X12.jpg|thumb|left|Juggernaut war droid and [[K-X12 probe droid]] exchange fire.]]
The juggernaut operated in a bipedal configuration, and had two alternate methods of propulsion. It could use twin outrigger jets to propel itself into the air for bursts up to one [[Standard minute/Legends|minute]], or the jets could convert into intake propellers for underwater use. Unfortunately, the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] propellers would often jam, sinking the droid. The juggernaut was armed with a [[wide-beam sonic stunner]] and a high powered [[shatter beam]], but its primary weapon was the [[pulse-wave rifle]].<ref name="NEGTD" />

==History==
They were first commissioned in [[4800 BBY]] by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Vocatara]], and they quickly saw service in the [[Gank Massacres]]. During the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], Juggernaut war droids provided [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] with much-needed supplies, since thanks to the versatility of their jet packs they were able to reach Republic personnel well behind enemy lines. During the [[Great Droid Revolution]], however, they were used by [[HK-01]], shredding the [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic rocket-jumpers]] in an air battle over [[Monument Plaza/Legends|Monument Plaza]]. Most of the droids were quickly decommissioned after HK-01 was deactivated.

During the [[Jedi Civil War]], Juggernaut war droids were the subject of experimentation by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Joni Ree]] on behalf of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] at the [[Czerka 431]] research facility. Ree, opposed to the Sith, leaked the facility's location to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and planned to use the Juggernauts to escape during a Republic [[Battle of Czerka 431|attack]].<ref name="Czerka" />

[[Ilum (Jedi)|Ilum]], an [[Iron Knight]], and some of her twelve children lived inside the bodies of Juggernaut war droids. [[Arden Lyn]]'s [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] arm came from Juggernaut droids.

==Behind the scenes==
The design of the Juggernaut war droid was originally intended to be used for the [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droid]].<ref name="SW-Repurposed ''Star Wars'' Technology - Back from the Drawing Board, Part 2">{{SW|url=news/back-from-the-drawing-board-part-2-repurposed-star-wars-technology|text=Repurposed ''Star Wars'' Technology - Back from the Drawing Board, Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref>
